_meta.note: Daemon-backed lifecycle lookup for jobs started by command_start_combed. Success returns counters and exit metadata, never raw process output. v1.1 adds TC11 frames_suppressed* counters (additive). TB-7: job_id carries an opaque-id format note (copy verbatim, e.g. job_<32hex>; from command_start_combed / run_and_watch) so the first call uses the right id.

invariants: state uses snake_case job lifecycle values
success payload reports counters and lifecycle only, EXCEPT the optional no-silence receipt
receipt is null unless the command finished with zero rule-driven events (TCE-ERG-1)
when present, receipt carries exit_code, lines_suppressed, a bounded tail, and tail_incomplete
the receipt tail is the sole sanctioned raw-output path and only ever appears for process probes
frames_suppressed, frames_suppressed_progress, and frames_suppressed_dedupe are required on every success response (always present on the wire; 0 when unused)
frames_suppressed, frames_suppressed_progress, and frames_suppressed_dedupe are lifecycle noise metrics (TC11); distinct from receipt.lines_suppressed
frames_suppressed equals frames_suppressed_progress plus frames_suppressed_dedupe (progress counts dropped frames; dedupe counts suppressed drafts)
frames_suppressed_progress and frames_suppressed_dedupe are diagnostic counters; bucket event count/first_seen/last_seen is the operator-visible dedupe aggregate
